plan: Conduct a literature review on the current state of sericulture and its challenges
Identify potential applications of AI in sericulture, such as disease detection and silk production optimization
Research existing AI-powered solutions for sericulture, including machine learning and computer vision
Analyze the impact of AI on sericulture in terms of efficiency, productivity, and sustainability
Investigate the role of AI in sericulture-related decision-making, such as pest management and climate control
Examine the potential for AI to improve the quality and consistency of silk production
Evaluate the economic and social implications of AI adoption in sericulture
retrieval_queries: Machine learning for disease detection in sericulture
Computer vision for silk quality control
Impact of AI on sericulture productivity
